module.name: PowerGuard
module.description: Monitor internet connectivity and safely shut down the computer after a confirmed outage.
view.title: PowerGuard
view.subtitle: Offline shutdown protection for unattended computers.
view.setupNotice: For unattended operation, enable QingToolbox login startup and Start with toolbox on the PowerGuard card. Closing this view does not stop the guard. This version does not read UPS status.
view.upsNotSupported: UPS status is not supported in this version.
warning.title: Network connection interrupted
warning.description: If connectivity does not return, the computer will shut down normally when the countdown ends.
warning.testDescription: Test mode. The countdown will not shut down the computer.
warning.cancelMeaning: Cancel suppresses protection only for this continuous outage.
errors.settingsLoadFailed: Settings could not be loaded; safe defaults are in use.
status.testUnavailable: A real shutdown countdown is active.
